Canal House Suites

Keizersgracht 100, Amsterdam City Center, 1015 CV Amsterdam, Netherlands
Scored 9.1 out of 10 from 1,284 reviews
US$242 for tonight

This restored residence offers generous rooms and a calm outlook beside the canal.

Markets, museums, and tram stops are a short walk away on a peaceful residential street.

Popular amenities

  • Wireless internet
  • Smoke-free rooms
  • Shuttle service
  • Reception open all day
